name: Todo Tab — Smart Productivity
description: A premium productivity dashboard. Tasks, priorities, analytics — all stored locally.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; connect-src 'none'; form-action 'none';
